semantic_definition: control-plane mode PX4 reports as selected
notes: Mode declaration is not a complete route.

semantic_definition: whether an external mode/controller is registered and eligible
entity currently authorized to command the primary path
notes: Must identify arbitration outcome, not request intent.

expected_source: message type and active controller path
notes: Level changes can replace downstream modules.

semantic_definition: topic or interface carrying the authoritative setpoint
notes: Record topic instance and bridge direction.

semantic_definition: age of the last authority-bearing message at consumption
control modules executing in the selected route
notes: Running does not necessarily mean influencing output.

semantic_definition: nominal modules intentionally skipped by the selected route
notes: Check expected bypass against actual data flow.

semantic_definition: message and producer feeding control allocation
notes: Key boundary between controller path and output path.
Needed for overlap and stale-writer detection.

semantic_definition: actual commanded actuator values and validity
notes: Correlate with allocator input and safety state.

semantic_definition: route that should replace the failed primary route
notes: Verify the target is fully installed after selection.
